class.name: InputHapticEffectPeriodic
class.brief_description: A haptic effect that represents a periodic force.
class.description: A haptic effect that represents a periodic force. The type can be one of either [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SINE], [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SQUARE], [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_TRIANGLE], [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SAWTOOTH_UP], or [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SAWTOOTH_DOWN]. You can apply an envelope to a constant force to give it shape, see also [member attack_length], [member attack_level], [member fade_length], and [member fade_level]. [b]Note:[/b] See [url=https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/desktop/ee418719(v=vs.85)]DirectInput documentation[/url] for more information.

method.name: set_effect_type
method.description: Sets the haptic effect type. The type for a periodic haptic effect can be either [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SINE], [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SQUARE], [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_TRIANGLE], [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SAWTOOTH_UP], or [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_SAWTOOTH_DOWN].

members.member: Period of the effect, in seconds.
Phase of the effect, in radians.
